workLog.step: Add OpenAI + GitHub Models providers to the eval harness behind an EVAL_PROVIDER/--provider Strategy
workLog.detail: New scripts/eval/_providers.py (EvalProvider Strategy: OpenAI, GitHub Models via openai SDK, anthropic-sdk; errors normalized to the existing HTTP-code shape; timeout=120 + max_retries=0 per release-it). call_api gains provider dispatch (default anthropic urllib unchanged). Adapter transport factory is provider-aware. --provider flag on eval-agent-vs-baseline and eval-prompt-change. Optional eval extra (openai) in pyproject.
workLog.evidence: uv run pytest tests/eval/test_providers.py -q -> 26 passed; uv run pytest -k 'eval_api_adapter or anthropic or providers or eval_skill_overlap' -> 126 passed

nextSteps: Live OpenAI/GitHub smoke after exporting OPENAI_API_KEY / GITHUB_TOKEN + pip install -e '.[eval]'
Run a real SkillOpt eval via EVAL_PROVIDER=openai to unblock budget-exhausted evals
